strName.description: The code name of the loot entry, as referred to in other files.

strType.description: Declares what kind of reward the table emits (condition, item, trigger, etc.). JSON field on each loot definition. Refers to entry within loot.json.

aCOs.description: Condition strings (Name=value*duration) applied by this loot entry — each name refers to entry within conditions.json

aLoots.description: Nested loot entries; each refers to entry within loot.json

LootUnit.description: One weighted entry inside a loot table (chance, min/max, sign). Parsed by Loot.ParseLootDef(). Refers to entry within loot.json.
